programmes.show_description: The Curse Of The Jinn. When a dark figure tortures Asha, her daughter believes a curse has been inflicted. The team take on their toughest case yet as they try to banish the entity. S4, Ep2

Drew visits a salvage yard in Cheshire containing vintage gym equipment with real muscle. At an antique shop on the south coast, he spots some decorative religious moulds. S12, Ep14
